sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَمُوتُ شَخْصٌ، يَزُورُ النَّاسُ الأُسْرَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kada neko umre, ljudi posjećuju porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: When someone dies, people visit the family.

sentences.translation: Izražavaju saučešće i govore lijepe riječi.
sentences.translationEn: They offer condolences and say kind words.

sentences.translation: Sjede s porodicom i dijele njihovu žalost.
sentences.translationEn: They sit with the family and share in their grief.

sentences.translation: Ovo je vrlo važna društvena obaveza.
sentences.translationEn: This is a very important social duty.
